files.title: Platform Architecture & Dev Process
files.description: Interactive overview of the Intellilake platform: architecture decisions, monorepo structure, Git & Linear workflow, tenant configuration flow (with SaaS/Dedicated toggle), CI/CD pipeline, and sprint cycles. 6 tabbed panels with clickable diagrams and detailed callouts.

files.title: Hierarchy Parser Pipeline
files.description: Interactive explorer for the hierarchy parser pipeline: configure dimensions, custodians, and parsing strategies. Visualize how raw fund/entity data flows through normalization, hierarchy building, and output stages.
